notes: VAL-P2P-001: TP=4 P2P allreduce 1.53x faster (122.2 us vs 187.3 us). VAL-P2P-002: All 10 decode steps cosine sim >= 0.999977 (threshold 0.99). VAL-P2P-003: 100-step benchmark completed at 12.4 tok/s / 80.5 ms/tok (allreduce=29.2% of time). Note: TP=4 throughput is below single-GPU (20.3 tok/s) baseline at this milestone due to allreduce overhead - this is expected as future milestones will optimize communication-compute overlap.
